subcodes.first_line: The world hath been encompassed by heedlessness, and all have been debarred from the Most Exalted Horizon, save those souls who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم را غفلت احاطه نموده و جمیع را از افق اعلی منع کرده مگر نفوسیکه در بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @love of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
